description: After the current interface/source-production fixes, the wider compiler2 sweep still leaves several type/semantic tests unresolved rather than sealed. Current failures include enum_reduce_named_ref_ok_settles_to_int, enum_reduce_range_settles_to_int, corpus_folds_settle_myreduce_to_int_fold_state_machine, fixpoint_leaves_no_reached_fn_unknown_fold_state_machine, and mixed_enum_take_calls_preserve_list_and_range_activations. Isolate the missing semantic/artifact fact flow and recover closure over these Enum/list/range cases.
title: Compiler2 semantic sweep: recover unresolved Enum.reduce/Enum.take range/list fixpoint cases
